para_trans: State Level Scheme of "Mukhyamantri Gramin Livestock Entrepreneurship Yojana" (General)
Update new account title for implementation
to be approved by the government.
Department of Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Dairying Development and Fisheries,
Madam Cama Road, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Read: - 1. Government of Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Dairying Development and Fisheries Department Decision No.
2. Office Letter from Commissioner Animal Husbandry, Pune No. Pashudhan-1 / Q. No. 911/1795/2025, Preference-13, Pune D. 13.03.2026.
3. Decision of the Department of Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Dairying Development and Fisheries. 29.05.2026

Government Decision: - Department of Animal Husbandry, Dairying Development and Fisheries, Government of India Read No. 1 here. A state-level scheme "Mukhyamantri Gramin Livestock Entrepreneurship Yojana" (GGVES) has been approved under 09.03.2026. To implement the scheme in the state, read No. The Government has approved three new headings of accounts vide Government Decision dated 3rd 29.05.2026. However, due to minor typographical errors in the said Government decision, the Government decision is being superseded by the following revised Government Approval.

The decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
